PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL LINDA ROSS CALLED THE CLERK THIS MORNING TO INDICATE THAT THE PARTIES AGREE TO HAVING THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR TODAY. D210 I. HAMMER, CLERK

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-19-2008 IN 206, DEFENDANT SRIDHAR GOUNI'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/1/08 IS CONTINUED TO 8/25/08 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED; A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND NOTICE MAILED BY THE COURT.
